arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with the Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-300d69bacf5c40c986d9ae5d6596498a && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax to match tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`. All 5 matched tests succeeded.
